## Stress Test Results

| Scenario | Portfolio Value | Liquid Buffer | Runway |
|----------|----------------|---------------|---------|
| Current | $1.7M | $500K | 33 months |
| -30% crash | $1.19M | $500K | 33 months |
| -50% crash | $850K | $500K | 33 months |
| -70% crash | $510K | $500K | 33 months |
| -80% crash | $340K | $500K | 33 months |

**You're fine.** Your liquid reserves are completely separate from your BTC allocation, which means market volatility doesn't touch your runway. You survive even an 80% crash with 33 months of expenses covered.

Here's why this 15% drop doesn't matter to your financial structure:
- Your $500K liquid buffer covers 33 months of burn regardless of BTC price
- Your BTC position (60% = ~$1M) could drop 50% and you'd still be fine
- You have no forced liquidation triggers

This is exactly why we keep runway discipline - so you can hold through volatility without panic. The 15% drop is noise against your 33-month buffer.

Your conviction allocation is working as designed. Nothing to do except let it ride.
